description: Automate the complete database lifecycle, from initial provisioning to day-2 operations, scaling, and disaster recovery.

features.title: Automated Provisioning
features.desc: Deploy production-ready databases in minutes with a single Kubernetes manifest. No manual configuration needed.

features.title: Day-2 Operations
features.desc: Automated backups, monitoring, scaling, patching, and upgrades - all handled by KubeDB operators.

features.title: High Availability
features.desc: Built-in replication, automatic failover, and self-healing capabilities ensure maximum uptime.

features.title: Monitoring & Observability
features.desc: Integrated metrics, logging, and alerting with Prometheus, Grafana, and custom dashboards.
